channel.title: Vehicles on ssebs | Sebastian Safari
channel.description: Recent content in Vehicles on ssebs | Sebastian Safari

item.title: XSR 900
item.description:
Story

Well, it’s been fun riding my first beginner bike, but it’s time to upgrade 😎.

item.title: Honda Grom
item.description:
Story

Okay so 1 bike wasn’t enough… So I got another one. But, this one is smol. My Ninja 500 was 451cc, but my new toy was only 125cc.

item.title: Ninja 500
item.description:
Story

I’ve always wanted a motorcycle, and I finally decided to get one. Now that I’m a bit older, I’ve got the self-control not to do anything crazy with it.

item.title: Audi S4
item.description: I used to own a 2014 Audi S4 (B8.5), had a few mods done, but ultimately it was too expensive to keep 😭.

item.title: Miata
item.description: I own and drive a 2021 Mazda MX-5 RF GT (Miata). This is my first daily driven stick shift car, and it’s so fun to drive!
